name: The Vacation in Koh Samui
overview: Actors Cha Seo-won, Gongchan, Won Tae-min, and Do-woo travel to Koh Samui to prepare for a fan meeting. From music video filming to shopping and relaxation, we have a great time with four actors in the beautiful resort of Koh Samui.

trailers.title: [비의도적 연애담 X 내 손끝에 너의 온도가 닿을 때] 강릉 F4가 함께 떠난 힐링 여행기 'The Vacation in Koh Samui' 단체 티저 영상 | TEASER
